fato_historico: 1799: Tekle Giyorgis I begins his first of six reigns as Emperor of Ethiopia.
energia_do_dia: The cosmos invites you to step into your own power today. Just as a new cycle of leadership begins under the ancient sun of Ethiopia, you may find that it is a good time to claim your throne. Consider leading your emotions with grace and courage as you embark on this beautiful, transformative journey of self-discovery.
frase_do_dia: Your heart holds the wisdom of empires and the softness of the moon.
significado_numero: Represents harmony, balance, and the nurturing strength of your caring spirit.
conselho: Trust your intuition and lead your day with authentic, open-hearted kindness.
